warnings: Dirty/unsaved state is not source-confirmed in this V1 endpoint; consumers should treat live responses as snapshots, not save-clean guarantees.

warnings.message: No source-confirmed dirty/unsaved campaign flag is exposed by this V1 local API pass.

warnings: Market data is intentionally omitted from V1 except for unsupported automation-blocking entries.
Cargo and transport capacity summaries need a narrower source-backed pass before automation-adjacent use.
Repair pressure is an aggregate summary, not a complete work queue.
